message:
feat(sdk): expose set_session_name + max_tokens accessors on AgentSessionHandle

Adds three SDK-surface methods to AgentSessionHandle so embedders that
drive pi_agent_rust as a library can do two things they previously had
to drop into internals to do.

1. Rename a live session

set_session_name(&mut self, name: impl Into<String>) -> Result<()>

Records a SessionInfo entry with the new name on the current leaf
path of the session tree and flushes session metadata to disk via
the existing persist_session pathway. This is the same shape the
runtime CLI's rename command uses internally, but lifted onto the
public handle so external embedders can rename a session without
reaching into Session/SessionEntry types directly.

The implementation acquires the session lock through the standard
AgentCx::for_request() request-scoped context (matching every other
mutation on this handle) and calls append_session_info(Some(name))
before flushing - so the rename lands on the path the user is
currently writing to, not whatever historical leaf existed when the
handle was created.

2. Inspect the per-prompt max_tokens cap

max_tokens(&self) -> Option<u32>

Returns the currently configured stream-options max_tokens. None
means the provider default applies; the openai-compat provider
defaults to 4096, which truncates tool-heavy generations. Surfacing
this as a const fn on the handle lets embedders log or assert the
effective cap before driving a prompt.

3. Override the per-prompt max_tokens cap

set_max_tokens(&mut self, max_tokens: Option<u32>)

Mutates self.session.agent.stream_options_mut().max_tokens. Persists
for the lifetime of the in-process handle only - the override is
not written to session metadata, so a fresh handle on the same
session path goes back to the provider default. Pass None to
explicitly revert the cap.

Tests

- set_session_name_records_session_info_entry: drives
  create_agent_session with no_session=true (so the test owns its
  tempdir and doesn't touch user state), calls set_session_name,
  re-acquires the session lock, and asserts both the cached_name
  field and the SessionEntry::SessionInfo entries list converged
  on "renamed-by-sdk". Also pins the entries_for_current_path
  helper as the canonical way to read session-info entries from
  the public handle.
- max_tokens_default_is_none_and_set_overrides: confirms the
  default is None on a fresh session, that set_max_tokens(Some(N))
  is observable both through the public max_tokens() reader and
  through the internal stream_options().max_tokens, and that
  set_max_tokens(None) reverts to provider default.

No external dependencies added. The change is additive on the
AgentSessionHandle public surface; no existing methods or behaviors
are modified.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
